pct_land_multifamily_byright.label: Multifamily land share
pct_land_multifamily_byright.description: Share of residential zoned land where 3-family or larger multifamily housing is permitted by right — no planning board hearing required. Derived from MA Zoning Atlas 2023 district data. For the 107 towns not yet covered by the Zoning Atlas, this reflects permit mix (share of permitted units that are multifamily) as a fallback.

median_home_value.label: Median home value
median_home_value.description: Median value of owner-occupied housing units. A proxy for housing cost and affordability pressure.

rent_burden_pct.label: Renters cost-burdened
rent_burden_pct.description: Share of renter households paying more than 30% of income on gross rent. High cost burden indicates housing supply shortfall.

permits_per_1000_residents.label: Permits per 1,000 residents
permits_per_1000_residents.description: Annual residential building permits averaged over the most recent multi-year period, normalized by population. Measures actual housing production.

renter_share_pct.label: Renter share
renter_share_pct.description: Share of occupied housing units that are renter-occupied (ACS B25003)

affordability.label: Affordability grade
affordability.description: Weighted composite of rent burden and median home value, weighted by renter share. In high-renter towns, rent burden dominates. In low-renter towns, home value dominates. Captures both active cost burden on existing renters and passive exclusion via high prices.

mbta_status.label: MBTA Communities compliance
mbta_status.description: Whether the municipality has complied with the MBTA Communities Act, which requires towns served by the MBTA to zone for multifamily housing by right near transit. Non-compliant towns lose access to certain state grant programs.
mbta_status.source: MA Dept of Housing and Community Development (DHCD)

rep_name.label: State representative
rep_name.description: Full name of the state House representative for this municipality's district. Sourced from Open States legislator data.

rep_pct_score.label: Rep housing score
rep_pct_score.description: Percentage of pro-housing points earned across 9 roll call votes and 2 co-sponsorship checks on housing production legislation. 100 = perfectly pro-housing record.
rep_pct_score.source: MA Legislature roll call PDFs; malegislature.gov CoSponsor API

rep_bills_scored.label: Bills scored
rep_bills_scored.description: Number of scored actions for which the representative had a scoreable vote (present in roll call or cosponsor check ran successfully). Pipeline diagnostic — not displayed on town pages.
rep_bills_scored.source: MA Legislature roll call PDFs; malegislature.gov CoSponsor API

rep_bills_available.label: Bills available
rep_bills_available.description: Total number of scored actions in the legislator scoring list at the time of the most recent pipeline run. Pipeline diagnostic — not displayed on town pages.
rep_bills_available.source: MA Legislature roll call PDFs; malegislature.gov CoSponsor API
